mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_unlocks(id, reflection_id, user_a_id, user_b_id, status, unlocked_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(gen_random_uuid(), #{reflectionId}, #{userAId}, #{userBId}, #{status}, #{unlockedAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE message_unlocks SET status = #{status}, unlocked_at = #{unlockedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM message_unlocks WHERE reflection_id = #{reflectionId} AND user_a_id = #{userA} AND user_b_id = #{userB}
